_**User (2026-04-07 08:28:37Z)**_

do you have access to the figma mcp?

---

_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.6)**_

Yes, I have access to the Figma MCP server. I can:

- **Read designs** from Figma files (given a figma.com URL)
- **Get screenshots** of Figma frames/components
- **Manage Code Connect** mappings between Figma components and your codebase
- **Create diagrams** in FigJam
- **Search design systems**

Share a Figma URL and I can pull design context from it.
